Together, they aim to infuse new energy into Chinese music, allowing audiences to experience emotion and healing through every note and performance. Featuring artistes such as Jane Zhang, Zhang Bi Chen, David Tao, Liu Yu Ning, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 19 媒婆变新娘
programme.desc: YeKang leads his men to attack XingJing gang and AhHuang is badly injured.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 20 媒婆变新娘
programme.desc: AhNuo explains to NuoLi why Lidi has a deep hatred towards the rebels. A mysterious foreigner helps LiDi, AhNuo and NuoLi to escape.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Tale Of Nokdu - EP 4 朝鲜浪漫喜剧–绿豆传
programme.desc: Quan Ludou demonstrates his extraordinary strength to the widows, hoping to join the widow's group for future missions.

programme.title: Rindu Atuk
programme.desc: While staying with his grandfather, Harun, Pian found a box containing love letters and items belonging to his grandfather. He and his friend investigate and later reunite his grandfather with his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 2
programme.desc: Exchanging his corporate image for that of a live streamer, Asri is straddling in unchartered waters. He struggles to find help from his ex-wife, Hani and two home-based sellers who are suspicious of him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 3
programme.desc: Asri wants to reward Kak Sal and Kak Cik for helping him with Raja Bundle's promo video. Hani is hurt when she mistakenly thinks Asri takes her shopping to reward her. Hani feels it is time to move on. Raja Bundle's business begins to bloom, causing the envious Madi Lambung to collaborate with other HBB sellers and try to sway Asri's customers. Asri is devastated when one of his HBB sellers betrays him and abandons Raja Bundle after Asri confirms a big order.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 4
programme.desc: Ema joins Raja Bundle and manages to boost sales for Asri. In return, Asri helps Ema to care for her son, Omar, who is recovering. Hani starts dating again. Amirul and Asri's relationship strains further after Asri jumps to conclusion and accuses Amirul of being a school bully. Asri announces the opening of Raja Bundle's cloud kitchen, much to the delight of his HBB sellers. When Asri bumps into Madi Lambung, he is shocked by the latter's hostility towards him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 5
programme.desc: As the Raja Bundle cloud kitchen takes shape, Asri also needs to expand his team while continuing to balance the other aspects of his life. However, a revelation about his ex-wife Hani is bound to surprise him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 6
programme.desc: When Madi starts selling cheap, Asri and his HBBs must find a way to overcome this challenge. But in trying to do this, they makes promises to their customers which they have trouble fulfilling. Ema and Omar were welcomed by the sudden arrival of an unexpected person.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 7
programme.desc: The HBBs who have left Madi Lambung begin to sell their products with Asri. Asri's former boss notices Asri's booming business and he is thinking of creating a post specially for Asri. Isnin goes snooping around at the cloud kitchen to see how Madi's former sellers are doing but something else catches his eyes. Zafrul sees hope in his relationship with Hani.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 8
programme.desc: Remi brags about his stints in the filming industry to Asri. Meanwhile, Asri has asked his HBBs to reduce his orders. But the HBBs coax him to reduce his prices so that more will buy. Remi wants Ema to stop baking at the cloud kitchen. Kak Sal tells the HBBs that Asri will be leaving them in the lurch. Kak Sal's rambling unknowingly feeds Madi with information of what is happening at Raja Bundle.

programme.title: Haikal Nak Jadi Cef - EP 9
programme.desc: Trouble brews back on the first day of school after the term holidays. Chef Rahmat's food causes Zaidi and Haikal to go to the nurse's office due to a food allergy. Haikal and Zaidi reconciles reluctantly. This causes Chef Rahmat's to close down his stall, this allowing Mariah to open the new stall in school.

programme.title: Makan Viral - EP 1
programme.desc: Makan Viral is a show where the host will travel to various destinations to test various foods and drinks, while meeting interesting people with interesting stories. The trip itself offers an interesting panoramic view with the opportunity to meet personalities who will share their passion for food and lifestyle.

programme.title: Zoom Spain - EP 7
programme.desc: The Zoom series is known as a riveting travel series where a dynamic duo of hosts begins an unforgettable adventure, delving into the history, culture, natural wonders, and culinary delights of a new country. From the bustling streets of ancient cities to the serene beauty of hidden landscapes, they uncover the stories and traditions that define each place.

programme.title: Seoul Cinta - EP 5

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree
programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin. Health+ 红枣原汁 + 桑葚原浆采用纯果汁制作，不加糖、不加水、无防腐剂。每一小包都能随时随地为你补充天然营养。红枣有助提升气血、增强免疫力、改善睡眠、呵护女性健康；桑葚则富含抗氧化成分，有助护眼、促进皮肤亮泽，全面提升你的状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Orofill Golden Serum / Health+ Orofill Revive
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages. 采用100%纯正西藏沙棘制成，富含190多种营养成分。外用黄金修复液有助于抚平细纹，缓解皮肤问题，加速伤口愈合；口服焕活软胶囊则有助于抗衰老、溃疡愈合，并滋养黏膜。两者结合使用，由内而外焕活身心，提供免疫力支持和女性更年期舒缓，温和安全，呵护健康，令肌肤焕发青春光彩。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 64 火鸟2020

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 10 我们回家吧 (第三季)
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 16 我的幸福结局

programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 9
programme.desc: Asri is falsely accused of embezzling funds by his ex employer at One Up Agency. He is remanded and tries to seek Hani's help to bail him out. While Herzy and Ema keep Asri's predicament a secret from the rest at Raja Bundle, Zafrul blatantly reveals to Amirul about Asri.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 10
programme.desc: Asri is determined not to let the setbacks befall him lately to affect Raja Bundle. Asri comes up with a new marketing and business plan for his HBB sellers. However, Kak Sal became increasingly suspicious when the police came to seize Asri's business accounts. Amirul urges Hani to accept Zafrul's proposal. Asri is confident he knows the identity of the culprit who had framed him for embezzlement. Asri confronts the perpetrator.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 11
programme.desc: Due to online trolls, Asri and his team must deal with the allegations against him which have now affected his sales. As he tries to find solutions, Asri is beset by more problems as Kak Sal and Ema both have differing issues that come to the fore.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 12
programme.desc: Asri is focused on getting things ready for his big online battle with Madi Lambung as he ensures that every detail is covered. Things also become clearer for Hani, Kak Cik and Ema with regards to their own wants and needs to move forward.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 13
programme.desc: The surprise that Asri has planned for the streaming showdown is going awry. Kak Cik and Ema are in dilemma if they could help. Hani begins to accept Zafrul's presence in her life when she sees Amirul's excitement in the wedding. Time is running out for Asri to prove his innocence and so will be Raja Bundle's.

programme.title: Anak Ayah
programme.desc: Anak Ayah is a bittersweet journey of a dedicated father who raised his daughter single-handedly, despite all adds. Just as her career starts to take off, he is diagnosed and illness and a dark secret he kept for 30 years threatens to tear their relationship apart.

programme.title: Stor Atuk - EP 9

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Killers - River Monsters: Invisible Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade looks at dark and deadly creatures - parasites.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Killer Weapons
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes a look back some of the killer fish he has encountered in the series.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Lethal Legends
programme.desc: Do underwater creatures with grasping hands stalk children in Japan on the Zambezi?

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - The Deadliest Encounters
programme.desc: What does it take to subdue a giant snakehead or wrangle a wolf fish?

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Killer Sharks and Rays
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - The Deadliest Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Untold Stories
programme.desc: Jeremy opens up and reveals some of the funnier, crazier, and downright scarier 'monster moments' that never made the final cut

programme.title: River Monsters: Top Ten - River Monsters: Top Ten
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade brings together the top ten biggest and baddest catches of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters: Lair of the Giants - Lair of the Giants (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river.

programme.title: River Monsters: Lair of the Giants - Lair of the Giants (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Monster Hunting Secrets
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Toughest Cases
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - US River Monsters
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Monsters in Unexpected Places
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Worst Nightmares aka Halloween Special
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Titanic - River Monsters: Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the safest boat in the Amazon, but when Sobral Santos II sank by the remote town of Obidos on the night of September 21st 1981 more than 300 people died. What had laid into the passengers?

programme.title: River Monsters - European Maneater
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates tales of a man-eating catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Colombia to investigate a creature blamed for killing a new bride.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Assassins
programme.desc: In the depths of the Amazon, legends tell of an evil spirit in a great fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: Attacks from unseen assailants in the remote mountains and jungles of Fiji's interior.

programme.title: River Monsters - The Mutilator
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Sengbogeo-eumjeok” (Pan-Fried Abalone Skewers) and "Semyeon" (Mung Bean Noodles in Omija Honey Water).

programme.title: A Bullet For The General
programme.desc: A band of Mexican gun-runners employed by a revolutionary general accept an American into their gang, unaware of his intentions.

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: The Street Fighter
programme.desc: Fast-paced martial arts action finds freelance fighter Terry Tsuguri (Chiba) hired to spring a convicted killer from prison. But after he succeeds, his employers renege on their payment.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.
